education.institution: Punjabi University Regional Center for IT and Management

highlights: Designed GenAI workflows using RAG, Agentic AI, and multi-agent systems with LangGraph to enable step-by-step reasoning, teamwork between agents, and automated decision-making in enterprise systems.
Implemented hybrid search pipelines using both keyword and semantic search along with RAGGraph to improve how accurately the system finds and understands information.
Built re-ranking logic using similarity and context-based scoring to ensure the most relevant and high-quality results appear first.
Processed unstructured content like PDFs and documents using Unstructured.IO with custom chunking and cleaning steps to prepare quality data for AI models.
Created text embeddings using Sentence Transformers (MiniLM) and used vector databases like Milvus and ChromaDB for fast and accurate similarity searches.
Measured model accuracy using metrics such as BLEU, ROUGE, precision, and recall, and ran A/B tests to continuously improve performance.
Developed intelligent agents that could assign tasks, track progress, and make decisions independently, improving efficiency in distributed systems.
Handled challenges like maintaining context, managing agent states, and coordinating multiple tasks while adding safety checks and routing agents for accuracy.
Built connected agent workflows (agent chaining) with routing logic and guardrails to make sure all agent interactions were secure and context-aware.
Used Model Context Protocol (MCP) to integrate different tools and maintain memory across multiple interactions for consistent and reliable outputs.
Set up observability tools like Langfuse and AWS CloudWatch to track model behavior, identify issues, and ensure stable operations.
Developed human-in-the-loop systems where users could give feedback in real time to improve model accuracy, compliance, and overall quality.
Managed AI deployment pipelines on AWS using services like S3, Lambda, EKS, and Bedrock, and automated workflows with Docker, Kubernetes, ArgoCD, and GitLab CI/CD.
Fine-tuned transformer-based LLMs on domain-specific and emotion-labeled datasets in Databricks to improve tasks like summarization, classification, and sentiment analysis.
Developed scalable AI and ML applications using FastAPI, Streamlit, and React to deliver real-time, API-based AI services.
Improved prompt design and preprocessing workflows to make models faster, more accurate, and better at understanding context in real-world use cases.
Architected end-to-end ML workflows using Apache Airflow for real-time financial market data, significantly reducing manual intervention.
Engineered Databricks-based ML platforms, managing data preprocessing, feature engineering, model development, deployment, and monitoring at scale.
Developed modular ML pipelines and reusable components, standardizing workflows and accelerating experimentation across quant and trading teams.
Implemented high-throughput ML dataflows with Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-learn, optimizing training and inference efficiency.
Performed exploratory data analysis (EDA) and statistical modeling using Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly, SciPy, and Statsmodels to inform trading strategies.
Configured API Gateway and FastAPI endpoints to enable secure, scalable real-time access to predictive models.
Automated hyperparameter tuning and model retraining with Airflow DAGs and Bayesian optimization to maintain consistent accuracy under dynamic market conditions.
Built CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and Jenkins, automating testing, validation, and deployment of ML models.
Containerized and deployed ML services on AWS SageMaker with Kubernetes, achieving elastic scaling and high uptime in production.
Integrated Prometheus, Grafana, and CloudWatch dashboards for real-time monitoring, drift detection, and proactive issue resolution.
Automated data validation and retraining triggers to continuously adapt models to evolving market data.
Instituted robust ML governance frameworks, including version control, lineage tracking, reproducibility checks, and compliance adherence.
Built a centralized feature store to share engineered features across projects, reducing preparation time.
Developed interactive dashboards with Streamlit for visualizing model drift, feature importance, and live performance metrics for stakeholders.
Implemented real-time feature pipelines using Kafka Streams and Airflow sensors, reducing data latency for streaming ML models.
Engineered scalable web applications and APIs to streamline health plan enrollment, claims processing, and patient data management, boosting operational efficiency.
Designed and developed RESTful and GraphQL APIs using Node.js and Express.js for seamless integration between internal healthcare systems and third-party services.
Implemented secure authentication and authorization workflows with OAuth2.0 and JWT to maintain HIPAA-compliant access to sensitive health information.
Optimized SQL and NoSQL database queries to enhance performance and reduce latency for high-volume claims and policy data operations.
Built and maintained microservices architectures to support modular, resilient, and maintainable healthcare applications.
Developed automated CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and GitHub Actions to streamline deployments, minimize manual intervention, and ensure reliable software releases.
Implemented caching strategies and asynchronous processing with Redis and RabbitMQ to improve system responsiveness and throughput.
Created internal dashboards and analytical tools using React.js and Angular to visualize patient metrics, claims history, and provider performance data.
Applied software design patterns such as Factory, Observer, and Singleton to enhance code maintainability, scalability, and testability.
Enhanced system observability by integrating AWS CloudWatch and ELK Stack for real-time monitoring, logging, and proactive alerting.
Created printable chart reports using HTML, CSS, and jQuery, providing visually appealing representations of data for users.
Leveraged jQuery and jQuery UI components such as Accordion, Autocomplete, Dialog, Menu, Tabs, and Tooltip to build engaging and interactive list and detail pages.
Implemented all admin pages, enhancing the user interface for seamless navigation.
Developed and maintained CSS layouts for intranet applications, ensuring W3C standards compliance and optimizing the overall user experience.
Applied extensive knowledge of CSS, including Backgrounds, Layouts, Positioning, Text, Borders, Margin, Padding, Tables, Pseudo-classes, Pseudo-elements, and Behaviors.
Implemented client-side form validations using JavaScript, improving data integrity and user input accuracy.
Collaborated with design and product teams to convert mock-ups and visual wireframes into HTML pages, ensuring alignment with the overall design vision.
Conducted rigorous cross-browser compatibility testing (IE, Firefox, Chrome, Safari, Opera) to maintain a consistent and optimal user experience across platforms.
Integrated each view with the backend using AJAX patterns and jQuery, optimizing data retrieval and enhancing overall application responsiveness.
Designed front-end applications and user-interactive web pages professionally using web technologies like HTML, DHTML, XHTML, XSL, XSLT, and CSS.
Developed client-side validation code using JavaScript.
Created HTML interfaces with a strong understanding of UI design principles and object-oriented programming.
Participated in multiple front-end design discussions, provided creative and efficient ideas, and implemented them using JSP, AJAX, and JavaScript.
Developed HTML and CSS-based page layouts using prototypes, wireframes, and images for vertical redesigns of websites.
Adjusted the width of list items to create different grid layouts and resolved padding differences across various browsers to ensure compatibility.
Worked extensively on the shop module addressing CSS issues, including cross-browser compatibility with IE, and added new functionalities using JavaScript, AJAX, HTML, and CSS.
Utilized jQuery core library functions for client-side logic implementation across applications.
Implemented various form validation controls, including custom validation controls using Object-Oriented JavaScript.
Effectively used JSON objects for efficient client-side coding.
Extensively applied AJAX to implement front-end user interface features.
